raw_response: During the final stages of preparing the pulp chamber post-stopko tip irrigation, it is important to thoroughly clean and dry the area to prevent contamination prior to obturation. From the given options, 5.25% NaOCl combined with either 17% EDTA or 17% CHX would serve effectively due to their antimicrobial properties. However, since we need something specifically mentioned for drying and cleaning rather than just disinfection, option involving only neutralizing reagents like 95% alcohol seems more suitable. Therefore, considering the requirement for efficient cleaning and drying, **\boxed{B}** (95% alcohol + 17% EDTA).
